question: Will SpaceX successfully land a Falcon 9 rocket on a barge by February 28, 2016?
resolution_criteria:
SpaceX's Falcon 9 rockets are designed to be re-used after landing vertically on a floating barge-based landing site. To date, these landings have not been fully successful.
Will SpaceX, by Feb 28, 2016, land a Falcon 9 well enough so that it sustains little enough damage that it can be re-used?
As of mid-November, the SpaceX launch schedule lists approximately eight upcoming Falcon 9 Launches in 2015 or early 2016.
